subject: [CLAMP] Replace YAML comments with helm comments
commit_message:
[CLAMP] Replace YAML comments with helm comments

This is done in order to make OOM compatible with helm3

Signed-off-by: Jakub Latusek <j.latusek@samsung.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2562
Change-Id: I7f95cf437e67876a4dc074b16cbfe7c7f0bfd9b1
